title: Add CustomerCreateDTO dataclass and pilot it in CustomerService.create_customer
description: Introduce a typed CustomerCreateDTO dataclass in src/models/customer.py as a pilot for the services-layer DTO initiative. Add the dataclass with typed fields: name (str), email (Optional[str]), phone (Optional[str]), company (Optional[str]), status (CustomerStatus, default CustomerStatus.LEAD), owner_id (int, default 0), tags (List[str], default []). Refactor CustomerService.create_customer to accept either a dict (backward compat) or a CustomerCreateDTO instance. Internally convert dict to DTO before processing. Keep all existing dict-based tests passing.
acceptance: 1) CustomerCreateDTO exists in src/models/customer.py with fields: name (str), email (Optional[str]), phone (Optional[str]), company (Optional[str]), status (CustomerStatus, default CustomerStatus.LEAD), owner_id (int, default 0), tags (List[str], default []). 2) CustomerService.create_customer accepts both a dict and a CustomerCreateDTO. 3) A new unit test test_create_customer_with_dto constructs a CustomerCreateDTO and calls create_customer, asserts result.success is True and result.data['name'] matches. 4) All existing dict-based tests in tests/unit/test_customer_service.py still pass. 5) Net diff <= 60 lines.
obsolete_reason: deferred while DB migration is in flight; will revisit after Task 1+
